content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Goa has always been the dream destination for party-hopping travellers thanks to its dynamic nightlife and vibrant parties. But that’s not all – it’s a much sought-after destination for newlyweds as well. At ATW Travels, we offer a wide range of Goa honeymoon packages that include the most romantic itinerary with plenty of opportunities to spend quality time together.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How to Plan Honeymoon Trip to Goa?”][vc_column_text]

At ATW Travels, we usually suggest the 3 nights 4 days Goa honeymoon packages that include attractions in North and South Goa. If you’re looking for the best time to visit, we suggest planning the trip from November to February. The weather is pleasant and comfortable around these months. The summer is off-season and the best time to shop for deals on Goa honeymoon package prices.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”20894″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Places to Visit in Goa”][vc_column_text]

From Calangute to Palolem and Candolim, Goa is blessed with some of the best beaches in India. Anjuna and Baga are wonderful if you’re in North Goa and the party-loving type. But South Goa is home to the best-secluded beaches that offer a serene and relaxing atmosphere for newlyweds looking for a quiet romantic stroll.

Typical Goa honeymoon tour packages from ATW Travels include all the famous beaches on the itinerary. Some of the other popular tourist attractions on the package include Fort Aguada, Dona Paula, Old Goa Church, and the Mangeshi Temple. At ATW Travels, we provide the best Goa packages for couples to accommodate all budgets.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646218522954{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Stay Connected

[/vc_column_text][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-phone” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786099141{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

+91 9693339999

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator el_width=”30″][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-envelope” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786244533{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646218533226{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Packages

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What to Do in Goa and When to Visit Goa?”][vc_column_text]Both North and South Goa are perfect for a honeymoon. While South Goa is quieter than North Goa, it has picturesque locations and quite a few quality food and entertainment options to choose from.

North Goa is more crowded, albeit it has more options for eating out and partying. If you prefer a summer honeymoon, early March to April is the best time to visit. Thanks to the summer holidays, May to October are hot but ideal for family vacations. But afternoons can get very hot, especially in urban areas.

If you’re planning a winter honeymoon vacation, November to early January is the best time. Not only is the weather cooler, but it is also a festive period, with Diwali, Christmas, and New Year, and the atmosphere is very lively. After mid-January, there is a slight off period, so going out options will be lesser, but it’s perfect if you want to avoid the crowd. Monsoon season also makes for romantic getaways. While this is the offseason in Goa, it’s ideal for nature lovers and those looking for a quieter time. Depending on the weather, however, some places may be out of bounds due to rain; many beaches get flooded due to high tide on monsoon nights, so you cannot go there for moonlit strolls.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”20896″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How to Travel to Goa?”][vc_column_text]

Goa is accessible by air, rail, and road. Goa has extensive rail connectivity and regular, daily flights, so you will have plenty of luxury options to choose from. If you plan to book during the peak season like March to April, October, or November to early January, book your travel options in advance to avoid missing out on the date or attractive prices.

While the place is well connected by air and train, we suggest travelling to Goa thanks to its scenic beauty. With Goa being a popular holiday destination for Indians and foreign tourists, all tourist attractions are safe and well-connected. If you’ve planned a more extended honeymoon, consider reaching Goa via cruise or enjoy a scenic road trip along the Western Ghats.

Depending on the season, you can even enjoy a Goa honeymoon package with flight costs included for as low as Rs. 15,000/. A Goa honeymoon package cost can start from Rs.20,000/- onwards during peak season. Goa honeymoon package price exclusive of travel costs in peak season starts from around Rs.15,000/- onwards. An e-tourist Visa facility is available for international travellers visiting Goa for USD 60. Eligible countries applicants can apply just 4 days before arrival or 30 days before arrival.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Goa”][vc_column_text]

Goa is home to a lot of 5-star hotels, resorts, homestays and cottages, all of which are safe for couples. Most offer breakfast and dine-in options, and proximity to popular destinations. There are lots of activities and places to visit safely at night-time too. Book with us, and you can rest assured of the most fun, safe and economical yet luxurious honeymoon trip.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Get to know about our daily offers by visiting our Instagram Profile.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]
